settings.title: Composition: content
settings.description: Preset composition of content — blocks labelled by id. Tier-3 asserts the cascade-applied result of the composition.

settings.content:
Body text introducing the section. The content composition exercises inter-block rhythm: each block past the first should sit at the rhythm distance below the previous one. The richtext element wraps inside the readable-column constraint and inherits the section's color-scheme tokens for paragraph + link color.

A second paragraph confirms the prose utility's paragraph-to-paragraph spacing is intact even when the wider rhythm is also applied.
